payload.title: Validate and scaffold executable Bridge files
payload.instructions: Confirm README primary paths exist, validate queue processing scripts, and preserve evidence/provenance separation.
acceptance_criteria: README primary paths exist exactly as documented.
Local import and processing scripts exit cleanly.
Invalid JSONL entries fail with clear validation errors.
No ChatGPT request writes directly to evidence snapshots or public Gist.

provenance.claim_handling: Treat user claims as hypotheses unless independently sourced.
